title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at ICICI Bank International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at ICICI Bank International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
